title: Entry
description:
Entries are notes that users can take. They're organized by "days" (which are user-configurable) and modeled within each day as a list of "notes." Each note has a type - the simplest is a "text" type, but lists, tables, and external files are also supported.

*Note:* the current Entry resource has a few limitations:
- Formatting information is not yet supported. Header formatting, bolding, and other stylistic information is not presented.
- Data in tables is presented as text always - numeric values will need to be parsed into floats or integers, as appropriate.

Note: Data in Results tables are not accessible through this API call. Results table data can be called through the Results API calls.

apiURL.description: The canonical url of the Entry in the API.

archiveRecord.description: ArchiveRecord Resource if the entry is archived. This is null if the entry is not archived.

assignedReviewers.description: Array of users assigned to review the entry, if any.

authors.description: Array of UserSummary Resources of the authors of the entry. This defaults to the creator but can be manually changed.

createdAt.description: DateTime the entry was created at

creator.description: UserSummary Resource of the user who created the entry

days.description: Array of day objects. Each day object has a date field (string) and notes field (array of notes, expand further for details on note types).

entryTemplateId.description: ID of the Entry Template this Entry was created from

folderId.description: ID of the folder that contains the entry

modifiedAt.description: DateTime the entry was last modified

reviewChanges.description: A list of the Review Changes that have been made to this entry

reviewProcesses.description: Review Processes associated with the Entry
